name: house-small
summary: A single-room commoner's house. Hearth for cooking and warmth, pallet in the corner, table for meals. Honest poverty, not squalor.

primary_palette.note: the cooking and living hub in one
family table is the central feature

story_prompts: clean and kept — a proud family keeping up appearances on nothing
weary — weaving loom in the corner, a widow's livelihood
crowded — too many pallets on the floor for the room size
recently swept for guests — best plates out, single candle lit
anti_patterns: no servants' quarters, no wine racks, no art — this is a poor home
one room, one function — kitchen, bedroom, living all overlap
avoid squalor unless the story demands it — honest poverty is neat
